payload.idea:
SkillSync is a browser extension that monitors job postings across LinkedIn, Indeed, and Glassdoor as the user browses.
It extracts required skills from postings, compares them against the user's uploaded resume, and generates a personalized
skills-gap report showing exactly which skills are missing and how to close those gaps.
payload.focus: Define the MVP scope for SkillSync as a browser-extension-assisted job-skills gap analyzer. Prioritize a user flow that lets someone upload a resume, view a sample or mocked job posting analysis, and see a personalized skills-gap report. Specify the core value proposition, target user persona, and landing page messaging focused on: 'see what skills you’re missing for roles you want' and 'learn how to close the gap.'
acceptance_criteria: Landing page is visually polished and clearly communicates SkillSync’s value in under 10 seconds
Page includes a believable demo or prototype flow representing resume upload and skills-gap analysis
Messaging is specific to LinkedIn, Indeed, and Glassdoor job browsing context without claiming unsupported integrations if not implemented
Gap report visuals clearly show matched skills, missing skills, and recommended next steps
CTA is present and prominent, such as waitlist signup or request early access
Design is responsive and usable on desktop and mobile
Copy and visuals are aligned with the startup idea and do not overpromise a full product

product_spec.value_proposition: SkillSync helps job seekers instantly see which skills they’re missing for roles they want and shows exactly how to close those gaps by comparing a resume against job postings in a simple browser-extension workflow.

personas.name: Early-Career Job Seeker
personas.role: Recent graduate or 1-5 year professional applying to multiple roles online
personas.pain_point: Struggles to understand why applications are not getting traction and which skills to add to become more competitive.

personas.name: Career Switcher
personas.role: Professional transitioning into a new industry or function
personas.pain_point: Needs a clear view of transferable skills versus missing requirements for target roles.

personas.name: Active Job Hunter
personas.role: Candidate browsing LinkedIn, Indeed, or Glassdoor daily
personas.pain_point: Wants fast, personalized feedback on every job posting without manually comparing each listing to a resume.

features.name: Resume Upload
features.description: Allow users to upload a resume in PDF or DOCX format and extract key skills, experience, and keywords.

features.name: Mock Job Posting Analysis
features.description: Provide a sample or mocked job posting analysis that demonstrates how the extension identifies required skills from a listing.

features.name: Skills Gap Report
features.description: Generate a personalized report that highlights matched skills, missing skills, and the most important gaps to address.

features.name: Gap Closure Suggestions
features.description: Recommend actionable ways to close gaps, such as courses, projects, certifications, or resume updates.

features.name: Browser Extension Overlay
features.description: Display analysis within the browsing experience on supported job boards, using the posting content the user is already viewing.

features.name: Role Comparison Snapshot
features.description: Show a simple side-by-side comparison of the job requirements versus the resume-based skill profile.

user_stories: As a job seeker, I want to upload my resume so I can instantly see my current skill profile.
As a user browsing a job posting, I want to see a mocked analysis of required skills so I understand what the extension will do on real listings.
As a candidate, I want a personalized skills-gap report so I know exactly which skills I am missing and how to close the gap.
success_metrics: Resume upload completion rate
Percentage of users who view a skills-gap report after uploading a resume
Landing page conversion rate from visitor to extension signup or waitlist

payload.html:
S
SkillSync
Get started
Browser extension for job seekers • resume-to-job analysis in seconds

See your skills gap before you apply.

SkillSync compares your resume to any job posting and instantly shows matched skills, missing requirements, and exactly how to close the gap—right inside your browsing workflow.

Install the extension View feature highlights
Built for early-career job seekers Ideal for career switchers Fast feedback on LinkedIn, Indeed, and Glassdoor
Job posting analysis — SkillSync overlay

Junior Product Analyst

Acme Health is looking for someone with strong SQL, data visualization, stakeholder communication, and a willingness to learn experimentation workflows.

SQL Tableau A/B Testing Communication Healthcare data
SkillSync analysis 76% match

Your resume matches core analytics and communication requirements. The biggest gaps are experiment design and dashboard tooling.

Matched
SQL, Python, communication
Missing
Tableau, A/B testing
Priority
Dashboards + experimentation

Everything you need to understand the gap

A simple browser-extension workflow that turns job descriptions into actionable next steps.

Resume Upload

Upload PDF or DOCX resumes to extract skills, experience, and keywords.

Mock Job Posting Analysis

Preview how the extension reads role requirements from a listing before using it live.

Skills Gap Report

See matched skills, missing skills, and the most important areas to improve.

Gap Closure Suggestions

Get recommended courses, projects, certifications, and resume updates.

Sample skills-gap report

Role: Data Analyst I

Match score: 68%

Matched skills: Excel, SQL basics, stakeholder communication

Missing skills: Tableau, statistics, experimentation, dashboard design

How to close the gap: Build a Tableau portfolio project, take a statistics refresher, and add one metrics-focused resume bullet.

Install SkillSync and start applying with clarity

Know what hiring managers want, what you already have, and what to do next.

Get started Join the waitlist

copy.tagline: See the skills you’re missing before you apply.
copy.short_description: SkillSync compares your resume to job postings in seconds, highlights the skills gap, and shows exactly how to close it with actionable next steps.
copy.cold_email_subject: Instantly spot the skills gaps holding your applications back
copy.cold_email_html:
Hi there,

Job hunting is hard when you don’t know why applications aren’t landing.

SkillSync helps job seekers compare their resume against real job postings in a simple browser-extension workflow, so they can instantly see:

  • Matched skills
  • Missing skills
  • What to learn, build, or update next

Whether you’re a recent grad, career switcher, or active job hunter, SkillSync makes it easier to turn job descriptions into a clear action plan.

Want to see your skills gap in seconds?

Best,
Team SkillSync
copy.twitter_post: Job applications shouldn’t feel like guesswork. SkillSync compares your resume to job posts, shows missing skills, and tells you exactly how to close the gap. 🚀 #jobsearch #careers #resumetips
copy.linkedin_post:
Most job seekers are left guessing why their applications don’t get traction.

SkillSync makes that easier by comparing a resume against job postings and instantly showing:
• Matched skills
• Missing skills
• Clear ways to close the gap

Built for recent grads, career switchers, and active job hunters who want fast, personalized feedback while browsing roles online.

If you’ve ever wished a job description came with a roadmap, SkillSync is for you.
copy.instagram_post: Stop guessing what your resume is missing. ✨ SkillSync compares your resume to job postings, highlights the skills gap, and gives you clear next steps to improve your match. #jobsearch #resume #careers #skillsgap
copy.slack_summary_line: SkillSync helps job seekers compare resumes to job postings, spot missing skills instantly, and get actionable recommendations to close the gap.

text.text: New Launch: See the skills you’re missing before you apply.

SkillSync compares your resume to job postings in seconds, highlights the skills gap, and shows exactly how to close it with actionable next steps.

SkillSync helps job seekers compare resumes to job postings, spot missing skills instantly, and get actionable recommendations to close the gap.

inline_comments.body: Strong hero messaging overall. Consider adding a more explicit mention of the supported workflow (upload resume, then analyze a live posting in the browser) so the browser-extension value proposition is even clearer at first glance.

The mocked overlay does a good job demonstrating the product. You could strengthen accuracy by making the sample output more clearly tied to the user's resume profile versus the job posting, since that comparison is the core promise of SkillSync.

qa_review.summary: The landing page is aligned with the product spec, clearly explains the resume-to-job-posting comparison flow, and includes the requested mock analysis and skills-gap report. Marketing copy is consistent with the value proposition and target personas.

payload.idea:
SkillSync is a browser extension that monitors job postings across LinkedIn, Indeed, and Glassdoor as the user browses.
It extracts required skills from postings, compares them against the user's uploaded resume, and generates a personalized
skills-gap report showing exactly which skills are missing and how to close those gaps.
payload.focus: Define the MVP for SkillSync as a browser-extension-assisted landing page/prototype that demonstrates job-posting skill extraction, resume upload, skills-gap comparison, and a personalized report. Prioritize one clear user flow: browse a job posting, detect required skills, upload a resume, view matched/missing skills, and see suggested ways to close gaps. Specify the target persona, core value proposition, and the minimum set of features needed to validate demand without building the full extension backend.
acceptance_criteria: Landing page clearly communicates SkillSync’s value in one sentence or less than 10 seconds of viewing.
Prototype shows a believable browser-extension-assisted workflow for job-posting analysis.
User can understand how a job posting, resume, and skills-gap report relate to one another.
The UI includes a polished skills-gap report with missing skills and suggested ways to close gaps.
Design is responsive and visually clean on both desktop and mobile.
No real LinkedIn/Indeed/Glassdoor scraping or backend integration is required for this assignment.
Copy and visuals are specific to the job-search and resume-matching use case.
The final output is demo-ready and suitable for sharing with potential users or investors.

product_spec.value_proposition: SkillSync helps job seekers instantly understand how well they match a job posting by extracting required skills from listings, comparing them to their resume, and generating a clear skills-gap report with actionable next steps.

personas.name: Early-career Job Seeker
personas.role: Recent graduate or entry-level candidate applying to multiple jobs
personas.pain_point: Struggles to interpret job requirements and identify which skills to highlight or learn before applying.

personas.name: Career Switcher
personas.role: Professional transitioning into a new role or industry
personas.pain_point: Needs to quickly compare current experience against target job requirements and understand gaps to close.

personas.name: Active Job Applicant
personas.role: Candidate applying to several roles per week
personas.pain_point: Lacks a fast, repeatable way to tailor applications to each posting without manually reading every requirement.

features.name: Job Posting Skill Extraction
features.description: A browser-extension-assisted demo that captures a job posting URL or pasted text and highlights extracted required skills from the listing.

features.name: Resume Upload
features.description: Simple upload or paste flow for a resume PDF or text version to power the comparison step.

features.name: Skills Match Comparison
features.description: Compare extracted job skills against resume content and categorize them into matched, missing, and partially matched skills.

features.name: Personalized Skills-Gap Report
features.description: Display a concise report with match percentage, missing skills, and a ranked list of skills to improve based on the target job.

features.name: Gap-Closing Suggestions
features.description: Recommend simple ways to close each gap, such as courses, projects, certifications, or resume tailoring tips.

features.name: Landing Page Demo Flow
features.description: A polished prototype landing page that walks users through the core flow: browse job, detect skills, upload resume, view report.

features.name: Manual Input Fallback
features.description: Allow users to paste a job description and resume text directly so the MVP can validate interest without a full backend integration.

features.name: Email Capture / Waitlist
features.description: Collect emails from interested users to validate demand and measure conversion from the prototype.

user_stories: As a job seeker, I want to capture a job posting and see the skills it requires so that I can quickly understand what the employer is looking for.
As a job seeker, I want to upload my resume and compare it against the job skills so that I can identify what I already match and what I am missing.
As a job seeker, I want personalized suggestions for closing my skill gaps so that I know what actions to take before applying.
success_metrics: Prototype landing page conversion rate to email capture or waitlist sign-up
Percentage of users who complete the full demo flow from job posting to skills-gap report
User-reported usefulness score for the skills-gap report and gap-closing suggestions

product_spec.value_proposition: SkillSync helps job seekers instantly understand how well they match a job posting by extracting required skills from listings, comparing them to their resume, and generating a clear skills-gap report with actionable next steps.

payload.html:
SkillSync
Browser-extension-assisted demo • No setup required
Instantly understand how well you match a job posting

See your skills gap before you apply.

SkillSync extracts required skills from any job listing, compares them to your resume, and generates a clear match report with next steps. Built for job seekers who want to tailor faster and apply smarter.

Install / Get Started View sample report
Works as a polished prototype for job-posting skill extraction, resume comparison, and gap-closing suggestions.
SkillSync Extension • Capturing job posting
Step 1
Frontend Developer — Remote
SkillSync detects requirements directly from the job post.
React
TypeScript
REST APIs
Accessibility
Testing
Step 2
Resume uploaded
React
HTML/CSS
TypeScript
Step 3
Skills-gap report ready
74% match
2 missing
1 partial

Designed for fast, repeatable job applications

SkillSync is a conversion-friendly landing page demo that shows how a browser extension can help early-career candidates, career switchers, and active applicants quickly compare job requirements against a resume.

Job Posting Skill Extraction

Paste a job description or drop in a URL to highlight the skills employers actually mention, so users can focus on what matters most.

Resume Upload

Simple upload or paste flow for a PDF or text resume, giving the demo a realistic comparison step without backend complexity.

Skills Match Comparison

Automatically groups skills into matched, missing, and partially matched so users can see fit at a glance.

Personalized Skills-Gap Report

Displays match percentage, missing skills, and a ranked list of improvements tailored to the target role.

Gap-Closing Suggestions

Recommends courses, projects, certifications, and resume tailoring tips to turn gaps into an action plan.

Manual Input Fallback

Let users paste job and resume text directly to validate interest and keep the MVP feel accessible and lightweight.

Sample Skills-Gap Report
74%
match to the target job posting based on extracted skills and resume content.
Matched skills React, HTML/CSS, Git, API integration
4
Missing skills Testing, Accessibility
2
Partially matched TypeScript, Performance optimization
2

Top next step

Take a basic accessibility course and update one project to demonstrate keyboard navigation and semantic markup.

Resume tailoring tip

Reorder bullet points to surface React, API work, and any testing experience near the top of the resume.

Why users care

Instead of reading every posting manually, job seekers get a quick, repeatable way to decide what to highlight and what to learn next.

Get early access to SkillSync

Join the waitlist to test the browser-extension demo and see your own skills gap in seconds.

Install / Join Waitlist
Validated for prototype demos, landing page conversion, and waitlist interest capture.

user_stories: As a job seeker, I want to capture a job posting and see the skills it requires so that I can quickly understand what the employer is looking for.
As a job seeker, I want to upload my resume and compare it against the job skills so that I can identify what I already match and what I am missing.
As a job seeker, I want personalized suggestions for closing my skill gaps so that I know what actions to take before applying.

copy.tagline: Know your job match in seconds.
copy.short_description: SkillSync helps job seekers instantly compare a job posting against their resume, surface missing skills, and get actionable next steps to close the gap before applying.
copy.cold_email_subject: See your job fit in seconds with SkillSync
copy.cold_email_html:
Hi there,

Applying for jobs can feel like guesswork. SkillSync makes it simple: paste a job posting and your resume, and instantly see how well you match.

Our prototype extracts required skills, compares them to your resume, and generates a clear skills-gap report with matched, missing, and partially matched skills plus next-step suggestions.

If you’re a recent grad, career switcher, or active job applicant, SkillSync helps you know what to highlight, what to learn, and how to tailor each application faster.

We’d love for you to try the demo and join the waitlist.

Best,
The SkillSync team
copy.twitter_post: Job hunting shouldn’t be guesswork. 🔎 SkillSync lets you compare a job posting with your resume in seconds, see your skills match, and get actionable gap-closing tips. Perfect for job seekers, career switchers, and anyone applying fast. #jobsearch #careeradvice #resume
copy.linkedin_post:
Excited to share SkillSync — a prototype that helps job seekers instantly understand how well they match a role.

Paste a job posting and your resume, and SkillSync will:
• Extract required skills from the listing
• Compare them against your resume
• Generate a clear skills-gap report
• Suggest next steps to close gaps

Built for recent grads, career switchers, and active applicants who want a faster way to tailor applications and apply with confidence.

We’re validating interest now and would love feedback from job seekers and recruiters alike.

✨ Compare with your resume
✨ Get a simple gap report
✨ Learn what to improve next

Perfect for grads, career switchers, and anyone applying to multiple jobs. #jobsearch #resume #careertips #careerswitch #jobhunt

text.text: New Launch: Know your job match in seconds.

SkillSync helps job seekers instantly compare a job posting against their resume, surface missing skills, and get actionable next steps to close the gap before applying.

SkillSync is a job-seeker prototype that compares resumes to job postings, highlights skill gaps, and suggests next steps to help users apply smarter and faster.

product_spec.value_proposition: SkillSync helps job seekers instantly understand how well they match a job posting by extracting required skills from listings, comparing them to their resume, and generating a clear skills-gap report with actionable next steps.

personas.name: Early-career Job Seeker
personas.role: Recent graduate or entry-level candidate applying to multiple jobs
personas.pain_point: Struggles to interpret job requirements and identify which skills to highlight or learn before applying.

personas.name: Career Switcher
personas.role: Professional transitioning into a new role or industry
personas.pain_point: Needs to quickly compare current experience against target job requirements and understand gaps to close.

personas.name: Active Job Applicant
personas.role: Candidate applying to several roles per week
personas.pain_point: Lacks a fast, repeatable way to tailor applications to each posting without manually reading every requirement.

features.name: Job Posting Skill Extraction
features.description: A browser-extension-assisted demo that captures a job posting URL or pasted text and highlights extracted required skills from the listing.

features.name: Resume Upload
features.description: Simple upload or paste flow for a resume PDF or text version to power the comparison step.

features.name: Skills Match Comparison
features.description: Compare extracted job skills against resume content and categorize them into matched, missing, and partially matched skills.

features.name: Personalized Skills-Gap Report
features.description: Display a concise report with match percentage, missing skills, and a ranked list of skills to improve based on the target job.

features.name: Gap-Closing Suggestions
features.description: Recommend simple ways to close each gap, such as courses, projects, certifications, or resume tailoring tips.

features.name: Landing Page Demo Flow
features.description: A polished prototype landing page that walks users through the core flow: browse job, detect skills, upload resume, view report.

features.name: Manual Input Fallback
features.description: Allow users to paste a job description and resume text directly so the MVP can validate interest without a full backend integration.

features.name: Email Capture / Waitlist
features.description: Collect emails from interested users to validate demand and measure conversion from the prototype.

user_stories: As a job seeker, I want to capture a job posting and see the skills it requires so that I can quickly understand what the employer is looking for.
As a job seeker, I want to upload my resume and compare it against the job skills so that I can identify what I already match and what I am missing.
As a job seeker, I want personalized suggestions for closing my skill gaps so that I know what actions to take before applying.
success_metrics: Prototype landing page conversion rate to email capture or waitlist sign-up
Percentage of users who complete the full demo flow from job posting to skills-gap report
User-reported usefulness score for the skills-gap report and gap-closing suggestions

engineer_output.html:
SkillSync
Browser-extension-assisted demo • No setup required
Instantly understand how well you match a job posting

See your skills gap before you apply.

SkillSync extracts required skills from any job listing, compares them to your resume, and generates a clear match report with next steps. Built for job seekers who want to tailor faster and apply smarter.

Install / Get Started View sample report
Works as a polished prototype for job-posting skill extraction, resume comparison, and gap-closing suggestions.
SkillSync Extension • Capturing job posting
Step 1
Frontend Developer — Remote
SkillSync detects requirements directly from the job post.
React
TypeScript
REST APIs
Accessibility
Testing
Step 2
Resume uploaded
React
HTML/CSS
TypeScript
Step 3
Skills-gap report ready
74% match
2 missing
1 partial

Designed for fast, repeatable job applications

SkillSync is a conversion-friendly landing page demo that shows how a browser extension can help early-career candidates, career switchers, and active applicants quickly compare job requirements against a resume.

Job Posting Skill Extraction

Paste a job description or drop in a URL to highlight the skills employers actually mention, so users can focus on what matters most.

Resume Upload

Simple upload or paste flow for a PDF or text resume, giving the demo a realistic comparison step without backend complexity.

Skills Match Comparison

Automatically groups skills into matched, missing, and partially matched so users can see fit at a glance.

Personalized Skills-Gap Report

Displays match percentage, missing skills, and a ranked list of improvements tailored to the target role.

Gap-Closing Suggestions

Recommends courses, projects, certifications, and resume tailoring tips to turn gaps into an action plan.

Manual Input Fallback

Let users paste job and resume text directly to validate interest and keep the MVP feel accessible and lightweight.

Sample Skills-Gap Report
74%
match to the target job posting based on extracted skills and resume content.
Matched skills React, HTML/CSS, Git, API integration
4
Missing skills Testing, Accessibility
2
Partially matched TypeScript, Performance optimization
2

Top next step

Take a basic accessibility course and update one project to demonstrate keyboard navigation and semantic markup.

Resume tailoring tip

Reorder bullet points to surface React, API work, and any testing experience near the top of the resume.

Why users care

Instead of reading every posting manually, job seekers get a quick, repeatable way to decide what to highlight and what to learn next.

Get early access to SkillSync

Join the waitlist to test the browser-extension demo and see your own skills gap in seconds.

Install / Join Waitlist
Validated for prototype demos, landing page conversion, and waitlist interest capture.

text.text: New Launch: Know your job match in seconds.

SkillSync helps job seekers instantly compare a job posting against their resume, surface missing skills, and get actionable next steps to close the gap before applying.

SkillSync is a job-seeker prototype that compares resumes to job postings, highlights skill gaps, and suggests next steps to help users apply smarter and faster.

inline_comments.body: Strong hero section and demo framing. Consider adding a more explicit mention that users can paste a job description and resume text directly here, since manual input fallback is a must-have in the spec and should be easy to spot immediately.

The sample report is clear and aligned with the product. It would be even stronger if the report visually separated matched, missing, and partially matched skills more distinctly, since that categorization is a core user outcome.

qa_review.summary: The landing page is polished and accurately represents SkillSync's core value prop, persona fit, and demo flow. It covers the must-have features well for a prototype and includes waitlist-oriented conversion messaging.
